1809350.name: The Last Draw
1809350.description:
From the Ashes of the Great Combustion 

The Last Draw is an immersive single-player card RPG that plunges you into a post-apocalyptic world where the air itself has become poison. In this atmospheric survival experience, every card you reveal could be your salvation—or your doom.

A World Transformed

The Great Combustion wasn't a nuclear war or natural disaster—it was the day the atmosphere itself turned toxic. Chemical plants, weather modification systems, and atmospheric processors failed simultaneously, creating a cascade of poisonous air that transformed the world forever. Now, some humans have evolved to breathe the toxic atmosphere, becoming the fearsome Ashborn—and they're hunting the survivors.

Core Gameplay

Every Stage is a Gamble

  • Reveal face-down cards to uncover enemies, items, weapons, and story encounters

  • Find the exit door to advance through 50 challenging stages across 6 dangerous regions

  • Strategic card management where every choice matters for survival

Weapon-Based Combat System

  • Use items from your 5-card hand to fight the Ashborn threat

  • Area-of-effect weapons let you damage multiple enemies strategically

  • Click-to-target combat with real-time damage calculation

Four Unique Origins

  • Scavenger: Resourceful survivor with bonus scrap generation

  • Ex-Military: Combat veteran with enhanced health and influence

  • Scientist: Technology specialist with advanced crafting abilities

  • Wanderer: Balanced nomad with food and medicine bonuses
